curation_notes: Primary location derived from patch diff: only wo/cli/plugins/stack_pref.py was modified, in the pre_pref function. The fix replaces a standard open() + separate chmod() with an atomic os.open() call that sets 0o600 permissions at creation time, eliminating the TOCTOU window. Checked sibling plugin files (stack_upgrade.py, debug.py, site_functions.py) — they use WOFileUtils.chmod but not the same create-then-chmod-on-sensitive-config pattern. Pre-assigned class race-condition is correct (CWE-362/CWE-367 TOCTOU).
